title: Sabudana Khichdi
procedure:
Soak sabudana overnight
Boil and chop potatoes
Heat oil and add jeera
Add chillies and peanuts
Add potatoes and sabudana
Mix well and cook
Add salt and lemon juice

title: Simple Rice
procedure:
Wash rice
Boil water
Add rice and salt
Cook for 10-12 minutes
Drain excess water
tips: Use basmati rice for better taste

title: Dal Tadka
procedure:
Cook dal in pressure cooker
Heat oil in pan
Add mustard and cumin seeds
Add garlic, onion, tomato
Add spices and cooked dal
Simmer for 5 minutes

title: Aloo Paratha
procedure:
Boil and mash potatoes
Add spices and mix
Prepare dough
Stuff potato mixture
Roll and cook on tawa
Apply butter and serve

title: Vegetable Pulao
procedure:
Wash rice
Heat oil and add spices
Add onion and sauté
Add vegetables
Add rice and water
Cook until done

title: Paneer Butter Masala
procedure:
Prepare tomato gravy
Cook onion and spices
Add paneer cubes
Add butter and cream
Simmer for 5 minutes

title: Masala Dosa
procedure:
Prepare potato filling
Heat dosa pan
Spread batter
Add filling
Fold dosa and serve

title: Chole
procedure:
Soak chickpeas overnight
Cook in pressure cooker
Prepare masala
Add chickpeas
Cook for 10 minutes

title: Rajma
procedure:
Soak rajma overnight
Cook in pressure cooker
Prepare gravy
Add rajma
Simmer well

title: Upma
procedure:
Roast rava
Heat oil and add seeds
Add onion and chillies
Add water and salt
Add rava and cook

title: Poha
procedure:
Wash poha
Heat oil
Add mustard seeds and peanuts
Add onion
Add poha and spices
Mix well

title: Idli
procedure:
Grease idli molds
Pour batter
Steam for 10-12 minutes
Serve hot

title: Sambar
procedure:
Cook dal
Boil vegetables
Add tamarind and spices
Mix dal
Simmer well

title: Egg Curry
procedure:
Boil eggs
Prepare gravy
Add spices
Add eggs
Cook for 5 minutes

title: Chicken Curry
procedure:
Marinate chicken
Cook onions and spices
Add chicken
Add water
Cook until done
